title: URGENT: Assembly Technician/Engineer x4 (semicon/mfg)
description:
What you'll be doing

  • Assemble, install, test, and maintain a variety of equipment and machinery used in semiconductor manufacturing

  • Troubleshoot and diagnose issues with equipment, identifying and resolving problems to ensure optimal performance

  • Perform preventative maintenance and routine inspections to maintain the integrity and reliability of production equipment

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement process improvements and identify opportunities for efficiency gains

  • Document all work performed and maintain detailed records of equipment performance and maintenance activities

  • Adhere to strict safety protocols and ensure a safe working environment for all personnel


What we're looking for

  • Nitec / Diploma in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering or equivalent.

  • Minimum 2 years of experience in the semiconductor or manufacturing industry

  • Strong mechanical aptitude and technical skills, with the ability to read and interpret technical schematics and manuals

  • Good communication and teamwork skills to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams

  • Familiarity with quality control processes and the ability to follow standard operating procedures

  • Willingness to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and adapt to changing priorities


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref68@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
